positive: A majestic, minimalist golden retriever puppy silhouette happily jumping through a field of stylized wildflowers. The puppy is centered and mid-air, creating a dynamic, playful motion. The background features a soft, flowing watercolor wash of teal and pastel yellow, with scattered, abstract floral elements. The overall style is sophisticated modern vector illustration meets engraved etching, characterized by clean lines, strong contrast between the black silhouette and the vibrant background, and high visual impact suitable for apparel printing. Flat lay composition, golden hour lighting effect, maximal symmetry in the subject, print-ready, isolated subject, vector graphics, seamless pattern potential.
